## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX to discuss performance updates, ongoing campaigns, and content strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Block pages saw increased clicks, with "preventing payment delays" gaining the most](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Perdian pages experienced a drop in impressions, possibly due to seasonality](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Treasury programmatic campaign focusing on bank-specific templates, with California as the first example](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Content strategy shifting to include unique subtopics for reporting and metrics pages](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)

## Topics

### Performance Update: Block Pages

  - [Clicks increased while impressions leveled out](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - ["Preventing payment delays" page gained the most clicks](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Capital metrics page had a slight CTR increase](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Clicks were evenly distributed among other pages](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)

### Performance Update: Perdian Pages

  - [Significant drop in impressions across most pages](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [No clear patterns or migration-related issues identified](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Possible seasonality effect (January peak, February leveling off)](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Rankings remained stable, no major concerns](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Performance Update: Expense Category Pages

  - [Clicks holding steady in a range for the past 4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [No major CTR patterns observed](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Page on "five prime" showed a slight increase in CTR](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)

### Performance Update: Tuning Pages

  - [1.5 weeks since refresh of pages](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [One page saw a huge bump in impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [Impressions at an all-time high post-refresh](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Deeper analysis planned for next week with more data](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)

### Treasury Programmatic Campaign

  - [Template creation for bank-specific pages (California bank as first example)](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Limited programmatic opportunities found beyond bank-specific treasury management solutions](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Focus on larger banks appealing to corporates](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Some small community-oriented banks offering similar services to Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Low volume for state-level opportunities (mainly California and New York)](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)

### Content Strategy: Reporting and Metrics Pages

  - [Discussion on incorporating unique subtopics beyond the general template](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [Balancing between programmatic approach and editorial strategy](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [Plan to identify topics requiring unique subtopics and assess flow generator capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create a template page for California bank treasury management solutions](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Add checkbox column in Airtable for topic approval](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Ali to review and approve topics in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Vivek to confirm which two tuning pages saw improvements (likely cash flow statement and audit trails)](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Explore process for incorporating unique subtopics in reporting and metrics pages](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Follow up on Victoria's request for more blog and fresh pages via Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance of all page categories](https://fathom.video/share/z48vBo6rKeWGc7sn5Kjr_REG-3_LAQF_?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
